info.name: Almaqam API - Complete Collection
info.description: Complete API collection for Almaqam Car Rental & Limousine Service System. This collection includes all endpoints for authentication, car rental management, limousine services, client management, CRM, and more.

request.description: Returns banners, offers, blogs, and welcome points in one response
Returns contacts, car models, car brands, car years, car types, branches, cities, settings, and membership data
